prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约237名、195名、240名、398名、256名，整体波动较大，2024年曾后移至398名后2025年回弹至256名，近5年位次中枢约265 名，2025年基准位次约256名；该校在陕西省招生计划2021–2024年均为3人，2025年缩减至2人，2026年大幅扩招至10人，较2025年增长400%，属于极大幅 度扩招，将显著拉低竞争门槛，使最低录取位次大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学上海医学院为985、211、双一流高校，母体复旦大学软科主榜排名第5（2026年），属全国 顶尖层次，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及师德师风类事件），但抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，整体报考关注 度仍处高位；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学（A）、公共卫生与预防医学（A+）、基础医学（A-）、药学（A）等均为全国顶尖水平，对高分考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业持续高热推荐，社会热度居高不下；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年（约172468人）增长约19.7%， 考生规模扩大加剧竞争；该校位于上海，属一线城市，对陕西考生有较强跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生 计划从2人扩至10人（+400%）这一压倒性因素，最低录取位次将大幅后移；但考生规模扩大约19.7%及医学类专业持续高热对位次后移有一定缓冲作用。预测2026年最低位次约850 名，区间748–952名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制临床医师班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（含卓越口腔医师班）
- 基础医学（含尚医拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（含预防医学拔尖班）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班、药学产教融合班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校在陕西物理类大幅扩招至10人，预测最低位次约850名，区间748–952名。位次在区间下限（748名）以内可重点冲刺一档临床医学八年制；位次在区间中部（约850名 ）建议以二档口腔医学、基础医学为主；位次在区间上限（952名）附近可考虑三档预防医学、药学保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 237, 195, 240, 398, and 256, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, it dropped to 398, then rebounded to 256 in 2025. The median ranking over the past 5 years is about 265, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 256. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi was 3 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 2 in 2025, and significantly expanded to 10 in 2026, a 400% increase from 2025. This substantial expansion will notably lower the competition threshold, causing a significant backward shift in the minimum admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its parent institution, Fudan University, ranks 5th in the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), placing it at the national top tier, which continuously attracts candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving teacher ethics incidents), but its Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high overall application attention. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. Clinical Medicine (A), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A+), Basic Medicine (A-), and Pharmacy (A) are all at the national top level, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended with sustained social popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of approximately 19.7% from 2025 (about 172,468), intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. The university is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overwhelming factor of the 2026 enrollment plan expanding from 2 to 10 students (+400%), the minimum admission ranking will significantly shift backward. However, the approximately 19.7% increase in the candidate pool and the sustained high popularity of medical majors will somewhat buffer this backward shift. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 850, with a range of 748–952.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Stomatology (Including Excellent Stomatologist Program)
- Basic Medicine (Including Shangyi Top-Notch Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Preventive Medicine (Including Preventive Medicine Top-Notch Class)
- Pharmacy (Including Pharmacy Top-Notch Class, Pharmacy Industry-Education Integration Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university significantly expanded enrollment in Shaanxi's Physics Category to 10 students, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 850, ranging from 748 to 952. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (748) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program; those with rankings around the middle (about 850) are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 Stomatology and Basic Medicine; candidates near the upper limit (952) may consider Tier 3 Preventive Medicine and Pharmacy as safety options.
